name: 刘莲
bio: 刘莲，以莲花之力净化战场的战士。她以柔克刚，以水之力化解一切攻击，是战场上优雅而强大的存在。
bio_en: Liulian, a warrior who purifies the battlefield with lotus power. She overcomes hardness with softness, dissolving all attacks with water power.
story: 刘莲，以莲花之力净化战场的战士。她以柔克刚，以水之力化解一切攻击，在战场上展现出优雅而强大的战斗风格。

skills.skill_description: 以莲花之力向前闪现，留下莲花印记，对经过的敌人造成伤害。冷却20秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Flash forward with lotus power, leaving lotus marks that damage enemies who pass through. Cooldown: 20s.

skills.skill_description: 以莲花之力向前闪现，净化自身所有负面效果，并对附近敌人造成伤害。冷却25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Flash forward with lotus power, purifying all negative effects on self and damaging nearby enemies. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 释放莲花领域，范围内友军持续恢复生命值，敌人移速降低。持续15秒。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Release a Lotus Domain where allies continuously regenerate HP and enemies are slowed. Duration: 15s. Rage limit: 75000.

skills.skill_description: 释放强化莲花领域，范围内友军持续恢复生命值，同时提升友军攻击力。持续15秒。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Release an enhanced Lotus Domain where allies regenerate HP and gain increased attack. Duration: 15s. Rage limit: 75000.
